feed.title: SAP Community - ABAP Development
feed.subtitle: ABAP Development Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Fund center and commitment items fields disappear in CJ20N network header.
entry.content:
Dear experts,

I was given a requirement that Funds management integration with Project system for budget control purpose. 

Configured accordingly in "Maintain Field Status for Assigning FM Account Assignments" for Network header with Fund center and commitment item as required fields. 

A tab " UPDATE FUNDSMANAGEMNT'' appeared in CJ20N network header under "Assignments'' tab.

But there are no fields to update the fund center and commitment items.

The derivation rules are 1. WBS=Commitment item 2. Profit center = Fund center, derivation rules are working fine in FB50 manual input for WBS and Profit center. 

Kindly advise!

Reg

Balakrishna Pathuri

Yash Technologies Pvt Ltd.

entry.title: Re: ABAP class/FM/BAPI/IDOC to create/maintain Inbound De...
entry.content:
I have come across a solution to create an Inbound delivery in EWM using an ABAP program. Debugging the standard T-code "/SCWM/PRDI" felt overly complex, so I shifted to creating the inbound delivery using IDoc test transaction WE19 (IDoc type: SHP_IBDLV_SAVE_REPLICA). The delivery was successfully created through the IDoc, which led me to debug the IDoc function module "/SCWM/IDOC_INPUT_IBDLV_SAVEREP".

During this process, I identified a class "/scwm/cl_mapin_id_savereplica". This class is used in the IDoc function module for inbound delivery creation (specifically for delivery save replica).

Additionally, when I examined the function group of this IDoc FM, I found a wrapper Function Module (FM: /SCWM/INB_DLV_SAVEREPLICA) for creating EWM Inbound Deliveries. This FM uses the same class and approach as the IDoc. After numerous experiments and setbacks, I successfully figured out how to make this Function Module work independently to create Inbound Deliveries in an EWM Decentralized system. This FM would only work if it is called externally, i.e., in an update task with qRFC. I'll be writing a blog post soon that explains the program and process in detail, as I believe many are seeking a similar solution.

entry.title: How do you reverse engineer a JSON or API end-point to get the data TYPE you need in ABAP?
entry.content:
I am doing some work to connect to an API using an ABAP HTTP Client. How do I get the data structure to populate and send?

Note: I am working on an ECC system so I might not have access to all solutions proposed.

At this point I have reverse engineered the JSON (building a series of TYPES and putting them together) in a test program until it matches so now I know what the data structure is and how to populate it. 

When I worked with web services in the past we could upload the XSD file for the destination when we want to send data, and that XSD file would generate the ABAP data structures which worked really well.

There must be an easier way to do this. I would appreciated comments from people who have done this and can give advice. I am not a big fan of the "have you tried this?" brigade that are in fact only guessing.

Any experienced advisor would be appreciated.

entry.title: Performance Issue with /SCWM/TO_CONFIRM in SAP EWM
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Our company is using EWM in SAP, but recently we've noticed that some functions are taking a very long time to execute. I debugged the program and found that when the function /SCWM/TO_CONFIRM is executed and COMMIT WORK is called, it takes almost one minute to complete. This is significantly longer than expected.

Could you please advise how we can improve the execution time and make this process faster? I've captured and attached a screenshot showing the relevant part of the code.

Thank you in advance for your help!

Best regards,

entry.title: UI Annotation for masking field value
entry.content:
Hello,

We have created a Fiori Elements App and used the List Report Floor Plan for generating the front end application. We would need to mask a couple of fields like Security Token, User Password, etc. As per SAP Help in the following link, we should be able to achieve this by using the annotation @ui.masked: true. However, it does not seem to have any effect when we add this annotation to the Metadata Extension. 

https://help.sap.com/doc/saphelp_nw75/7.5.5/en-US/95/86f9043c194cfcb6b72c671e50d690/frameset.htm

Any help would be appreciated.

Thank you.

entry.title: Multiple email to ship to party
entry.content:
Hi 

Could you please let me know if it is possible to maintain multiple email email address to ship to party while creating sales order using bapi.

Currently I am using BAPI_SALESORDER_CREATEFROMDAT2 and I can pass single email in parameter "partneraddresses" and this is getting updated while I need to maintain multiple emails. 

Thanks

entry.title: How do I debug BUS2081? As it was releasing payment block of invoices unexpectedly.
entry.content:
Hi, I have tried to release invoices in MRBR. While it was successful, BUS2081 were releasing invoices that should not be released.

Sample document A in MRBR that were released:

Material Doc # 10008

Vendor 1001

 

Sample document that was unexpectedly released by BUS2081

Material Doc # 10008

Vendor # 8001

 

Assuming that the basis of the BUS2081 was the invoice number for releasing the payment block. How do I debug it? tried to set a breakpoint in ZBUS2081 then release an invoice in MRBR but the ZBUS2081 or BUS2018 was not triggered.

entry.title: Transport code of a query
entry.content:
Hello there.

I know this is a basic question but i'm stuck with this.
I've had to modify an old query, basically change some lines of the code for a field.

I've generated the infoset with these changes and I'm trying to transport this to our quality system.

I'm using this options:

A transport request is generated, I've transported it to our quality system but the changes are not there...

What step am I missing?

Thanks in advance, and sorry for this basic question... I hate these queries... 😕

entry.title: IDCP Enhancement
entry.content:
Hi Team,

 

I have the requirement in IDCP, which is related to the enhancement. I found 2 exits also EXIT_IDPRCNINVOICE_001 and EXIT_IDPRCNINVOICE_002.

The above two exit are not working , any other exit or BADI is there.

Kindly Suggest .

 

Regards

Hari Prasath

entry.title: How do I set a QRFC queue to status RETRY?
entry.content:
I am programming a function module that is bound to run in a QRFC queue. When the program fails, I want the queue to remain in status RETRY in order to have it run again. 

I tried to do a message E..., but then the queue goes to SYSFAIL and no retry is scheduled. 

What do I have to do in my function module to set the queue to RETRY?

entry.title: How to implement item double click for cl_gui_alv_tree?
entry.content:
I have existing code that uses cl_gui_alv_tree class.
I have a gist of the PBO code as below: 
Just pasting a brief syntax of what I have here since there's a lot of code.

CREATE OBJECT go_custom_container
CREATE OBJECT go_alv_tree 
PERFORM build_hierarchy_header CHANGING l_hierarchy_header. 
PERFORM build_fieldcatalog.
CALL METHOD go_alv_tree->set_table_for_first_display
PERFORM create_hierarchy USING iw_h_job_chain.
CREATE OBJECT go_events. "kavin
  SET HANDLER go_events->node_double_click FOR go_alv_tree. 
  SET HANDLER go_events->item_double_click FOR go_alv_tree. 
  CALL METHOD go_alv_tree->update_calculations.
  CALL METHOD go_alv_tree->frontend_update.
  CALL METHOD cl_gui_cfw=>flush

I have defined the below methods in lcl_event_receiver (object go_events)    item_double_click FOR EVENT item_double_click OF cl_gui_alv_tree IMPORTING fieldname node_key,
node_double_click FOR EVENT node_double_click OF cl_gui_alv_tree  IMPORTING node_key.

The tree is displaying properly but the double click on item level is not working. It is not getting triggered also in fact. Don't know what I am missing here. Please help with this thanks!

entry.title: SAP RAP Managed (without draft) Popup Confirmation Message with ok & cancel button
entry.content:
Hi All,

I am trying to develop a Custom Fiori Elements List Report App (Managed without draft) based on a Custom Ztable. I want to display a Confirmation Pop up in two Scenarios (Standard Operations & Custom Actions)

1. Standard Operation (DELETE): When user clicks delete after selecting multiple items on UI, a confirmation Pop-up should be displayed with 'OK' & 'CANCEL' button.

2. Custom action (SEND):  After selecting multiple records on UI and clicking on custom button, a confirmation Pop-up should be displayed with 'OK' & 'CANCEL' button.

How can this behaviour be achieved? Is it possible only through Backend?

Also, is there a way to customize standard messages such as '1 of 2 Objects cannot be deleted....' with more explanatory message.?

ABAP Development  ABAP RESTful Application Programming Model  @patrick_winkler  @Vera_Jiang  @gregorw   @William_Yu  @junwu

entry.title: RAP Managed Action RESULT is not updating the Response
entry.content:
Hi All,

I am working on a RAP Managed scenario with Unmanaged save. I have 2 actions as following,

  1. Test: Update few fields of the entityset and return the updated fields.
  2. Post: Execute BGMC Operation.

I have checked the post https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/rap-action-does-not-update-the-instance/qaq-p/12531084 however the issue remains.

My action is,

 

action test result [1..*] $self;

 

My bdef mapping is,

 

create;
update;
action test result [1..*] $self;
action post;
mapping for zasset
{
message = message;
}

 

My action implementation is

 

METHOD test for MODIFY
IMPORTING keys FOR ACTION Asset~test RESULT result.

METHOD test .
MODIFY ENTITIES OF zasset IN LOCAL MODE
ENTITY Asset
UPDATE FIELDS ( message )
WITH VALUE #( FOR <fs> IN keys ( %tky = <fs>-%tky message = 'Test' ) )
FAILED DATA(lt_failed) REPORTED DATA(lt_reported) .

READ ENTITIES OF zasset IN LOCAL MODE
ENTITY Asset ALL FIELDS WITH CORRESPONDING #( keys ) RESULT DATA(lt_result) .

result = VALUE #( FOR <fs> IN lt_result ( %tky = <fs>-%tky %param = <fs> ) ) .
ENDMETHOD .

 

The requirement is to fill the message field with some messages after validating the keys whenever user clicks on the action TEST, like a simulation. The POST action is responsible for COMMIT to the database.

The result structure is having the updated value for the message field, however the response is not being updated either in browser or postman.

@Andre_Fischer, could you please help me here.

entry.title: Automatically populate Person Responsible in IW32/33 screen
entry.content:
I want to auto populate person responsible field in IW33. The service order of certain order type and PM activity type is created through a custom transaction (using BAPI_ALM_ORDER_MAINTAIN).

I tried using pers_no in wtbl_oper table for the BAPI in the custom program but that did not reflect in IW33 screen. So I am thinking of using enhancements for order creation at save which will let me update the pernr field in afvgd structure for the ordertype-activitytype combination

Any other suggestions are welcome as well. Thanks!

entry.title: User Exit For IW47
entry.content:
hello,

i need to add a field in the input parameters to the IW47 transaction
should i use a user exit? which one should i use?

thanks

entry.title: How to Add Attachment to BP Store Business document
entry.content:
Hello,

Please suggest, how to add an attachment(PDF) to BP(tcode) Store Business Document through the ABAP Program.

entry.title: How to update MSR_S_SALES_ITEM data while creating Credit Memo Request for Advance Return Order
entry.content:
I am having a requirement to create a Credit Memo Request for an Advance Return Order although I am able to create the Credit Memo request using SD_SALESDOCUMENT_CREATE.

However, I am unable to modify the Refund Control and Customer RMA fields value for the created Credit Memo Request.

entry.title: Print Specific Pages After Mail Merge in Custom Program for DMS Word Document in CA01
entry.content:
Hi SAP Community,

I am working on a custom program where I need to print a DMS document attached in transaction CA01. We are currently performing a mail merge and printing the document using a custom-developed program, and this functionality is working as expected.

However, the requirement has changed. Now, I need to print only specific pages of the document, based on the input parameters provided, after performing the mail merge.

Could someone please guide me on how to achieve the following:

  • Perform the mail merge as usual.
  • Print only the pages specified by the input parameters instead of printing the entire document.

Mail Merge :

i_oi_document_prox->has_mail_merge_interface 

i_oi_document_prox->get_mail_merge_interface

Print :

i_oi_mail_merg->print

I would appreciate any insights, code snippets, or suggestions on how to implement this functionality.

Thanks in advance!

SAP NetWeaver Application Server for ABAP

entry.title: LO-VC BOM Explosion into Routing
entry.content:
Hello,

I need to calculate the times for routing with a FUBA. For this I need an explodet BOM at runtime. In PMEVC an CS50 used seccessful this FUBA "CUKO_DDB_BOM_POSITION_GET".

This is my current coding.

CALL FUNCTION 'CUKO_DDB_HAS_ACT_ROOT_INSTANCE'
 IMPORTING
   ROOT_INSTANCE       = lv_instance.

lv_result     = 'X'.
lv_masterdate = ' '.
lv_enforce    = ' '.

CALL FUNCTION 'CUKO_DDB_BOM_POSITION_GET'
 EXPORTING
   OBJECT_INSTANCE          = lv_instance
   RESULT                   = lv_result
   MASTERDATA               = lv_masterdate
 IMPORTING
   BOM_POSITION             = wa_bom_position
 TABLES
   T_BOM_POSITION           = it_T_BOM_POSITION
 EXCEPTIONS
   INSTANCE_NOT_FOUND       = 1
   INSTANCE_IS_A_ROOT       = 2
   OTHERS                   = 3

But in VA01, VA02 and MD50 doesn´t work. Does anyone have a solution for how I can get to the BOM into VA01, VA02 and MD50 at runtime?

I could use the FUBA CS_BOM_EXPL_MAT_V2 and the CUOBJ number, but there is no CUOBJ in the VA01 yet.

Best regards and thanks for help.

Thorsten

entry.title: Sap gui progress indicator on sap module pool screen
entry.content:
Hi I have module pool scree with one button 'Report'. Now I want to call a report program which does not have selection screen.

My button click is working fine but my report taking time to display results till that time I want to display a sap gui progress indicator. Kindly tell me where to add sap gui progress indicator so that after clicking on button it starts.
